intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把备用通信这个故事的关键句读顺。

sentences.text: Mr. James Scott has a garage in Silbury and now he has just bought another garage in Pinhurst.
sentences.focus_zh: 注意两个地名 Silbury 和 Pinhurst，要读清楚。

sentences.text: Pinhurst is only five miles from Silbury, but Mr. Scott cannot get a telephone for his new garage, so he has just bought twelve pigeons.
sentences.focus_zh: 长句先慢一点，but 和 so 前后分清楚。

sentences.text: Yesterday, a pigeon carried the first message from Pinhurst to Silbury.
sentences.focus_zh: 注意 carried the first message 的节奏。

sentences.text: The bird covered the distance in three minutes.
sentences.focus_zh: covered the distance 要作为一个短语读。

sentences.text: Up to now, Mr. Scott has sent a great many requests for spare parts and other urgent messages from one garage to the other.
sentences.focus_zh: Up to now 后面稍停，urgent messages 是重点。

sentences.text: In this way, he has begun his own private 'telephone' service.
sentences.focus_zh: private telephone service 是最后的笑点，要读清楚。
